SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGHI, TAVIA LAUGHON, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 130 EDDY ST. #310 AND 307, S.F. $2,650.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-01-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 9AM. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. IF DEFTS COMPLY DEFTS ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AND PLTF WILL PAY $300- MOVE-OUT FEES, $150 ON 3/4/98 AND BALANCE ON MOVE-OUT.
